title: Meenmutty Falls
tagline: Meenmutty Falls — heritage city of Kerala

overview.short: Meenmutty WaterFall is situated in Padinjarathara in Wayanad District, Kerala.
overview.description: Meenmutty WaterFall is situated in Padinjarathara in Wayanad District, Kerala. It is the largest waterfall in Wayanad. It is a three-tiered waterfall with a height of 1000 feet and it is on Banasura hills. It can be accessed from Padinjarathara ;.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Banasura Hill
topPlaces.description: Banasura Hill is situated in Padinjarathara and it is one of the tallest mountains in the Western Ghats of the Wayanad district, Kerala, India. The hill is named after Banasura, a mythical character of Indian legends.

topPlaces.name: Valat
topPlaces.description: Valat is a village in the Wayanad district of the state of Kerala, India. The village is situated near to Kannur district.

topPlaces.name: Thondernad
topPlaces.description: Thondernad is a village in Wayanad district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Padinjarathara
topPlaces.description: Padinjarathara is a major town in Wayanad district in the state of Kerala, India. The largest earth dam in India, Banasura Sagar and other main tourist attractions like Meenmutti Waterfalls, Bappanam Mala, Banasura Hill and Kurumbalakotta are situated in Padinjarathara.

topPlaces.name: Poozhithodu Weir
topPlaces.description: Poozhithodu Weir is a small diversion dam in Kavilumpara panchayath in Maruthomkara village of Kozhikode district in Kerala, India. This project is a run – off the river scheme utilizing water from Illiani puzha and Kadanthrapuzha .

topPlaces.name: St. George Forane Church Kallody, Wayanad
topPlaces.description: St. George Forane Church Kallody is situated in Mananthavady taluk of Wayanad district.

image.alt: St. George Forane Church Kallody, Wayanad

topPlaces.name: Kallody
topPlaces.description: Kallody is a village in the Edavaka Grama panchayath of the Wayanad district, Kerala, India. It forms part of the Mananthavady Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Kunduthode
topPlaces.description: Kunduthode is a small village in northeastern Kozhikode district, Kerala, in southwest India. It is under Nadapuram assembly constituency and Kavilumpara panchayath.

items.note: Banasura Hill is situated in Padinjarathara and it is one of the tallest mountains in the Western Ghats of the Wayanad district, Kerala, India. The hill is named after Banasura, a mythical character of Indian legends.

Padinjarathara is a major town in Wayanad district in the state of Kerala, India. The largest earth dam in India, Banasura Sagar and other main tourist attractions like Meenmutti Waterfalls, Bappanam Mala, Banasura Hill and Kurumbalakotta are situated in Padinjarathara.

Poozhithodu Weir is a small diversion dam in Kavilumpara panchayath in Maruthomkara village of Kozhikode district in Kerala, India. This project is a run – off the river scheme utilizing water from Illiani puzha and Kadanthrapuzha .

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Meenmutty Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Meenmutty Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Meenmutty Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (104 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Meenmutty Falls?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Meenmutty Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Meenmutty Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Meenmutty Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Meenmutty Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Banasura Hill, Valat, Thondernad, Padinjarathara, Poozhithodu Weir.
